memory:memory/2026-04-09.md:23:55.snippet: - `openclaw system event` command failing (visible in error logs) - Tasks queued but sub-agents not being triggered - PRs affected: #5202, #559, #557, #5161, #5199, #558, #5215, others ## Technical Notes - GitHub review API inline comment format: ```json { "path": "src/file.py", "line": 42, "side": "RIGHT", "body": "..." } ``` - `line` = line number in NEW version of file (not diff position, not old file) - Line MUST appear in the diff (added or modified lines only) # 2026-04-09 — Daily Log ## PR Review Bot Safety Updates - Added **absolute prohibitions** on destructive repo operations to all 5 agent files: - SKILL.md, isaaclab-expert.md, silent-failure-hunter.md,
